requirement_topic.en: Filtering Performance and Construction Safety for Occupational Respirators
requirement_topic.zh: 职业过滤呼吸器过滤性能与结构安全
requirement_topic.zht: 職業過濾呼吸器過濾性能與結構安全

summary.en: Thailand uses TISI-referenced performance controls for PPE respirator classes used in workplaces, including minimum filtration performance, fit and leakage expectations, breathing resistance, and materials durability under work use. The exact TISI standard number, class naming, and test method set should be confirmed from current TISI notices and the in-country conformity route before shipment. Where a respirator is marketed with electronics or sensor add-ons, Thailand may also require additional electrical accessory safety review outside the core respiratory performance scope.
summary.zh: 泰国按TISI参照的职业场景呼吸器分类进行性能控制，通常包括最小过滤效率、贴合与泄漏控制、呼吸阻力及工况耐久性。出口商应在出货前基于最新TISI公告与本地合格路径核实确切TISI编号、等级命名和测试方法。对于搭载电子或传感器附件的型号，除核心呼吸性能外还可能触发额外电气附件安全复核。
summary.zht: 泰國按TISI參照的職場呼吸器分類進行性能控制，通常包括最小過濾效率、貼合與洩漏控制、呼吸阻力及工況耐久性。出口商應在出貨前基於最新TISI公告與本地合格路徑核實確切TISI編號、等級命名和測試方法。對於搭載電子或感測器附件的型號，除核心呼吸性能外還可能觸發額外電氣附件安全複核。

standards_or_laws: Ministry of Labour occupational PPE expectations for workplace PPE
Additional electrical safety review for powered or electronic respirator accessories

summary.en: China applies GB 2626-2019 as the major industrial respirator standard. GB 2626 uses KN90 and KN95 performance groupings, NaCl aerosol performance, penetration, leakage, breathing resistance, and related test criteria. Chinese CNAS-accredited test reports are useful baseline evidence but are not automatically equivalent to Thailand route outcomes.
summary.zh: 中国工业过滤式呼吸器主要依据GB 2626-2019。GB 2626采用KN90与KN95分组，并对NaCl气溶胶过滤、颗粒渗透、漏气、呼吸阻力等指标提出测试要求。CNAS认可检测试验报告是有价值的基线，但不自动等同泰国合规结果。
summary.zht: 中國工業過濾式呼吸器主要依據GB 2626-2019。GB 2626採用KN90與KN95分組，並對NaCl氣溶膠過濾、顆粒滲透、漏氣、呼吸阻力等指標提出測試要求。CNAS認可檢測報告是有價值的基線，但不自動等同泰國合規結果。

standards_or_laws: GB 2626-2019 — Respiratory protective equipment — Non-powered air-purifying particle respirator
CNAS testing framework and CCC-related evidence

gap.en: The principal gap is method and recognition mapping. A Chinese test report against GB 2626-2019 does not by itself prove Thai occupational respirator conformity. Exporters usually need Thai-route mapping to confirm whether retesting, additional documentation, or supplementary controls are required for the target class and usage profile. Power or sensor variants usually need additional validation for electric components and user-safety integration.
gap.zh: 主要差距在于方法与认可映射。中国针对GB 2626-2019的测试报告本身不能证明泰国职业呼吸器合规。出口商通常需按泰国路径核实目标等级和使用场景下是否需要复测、补充文件或追加安全控制。含动力或传感器的变型通常需要额外验证电气部件与使用安全集成。
gap.zht: 主要差距在於方法與認可映射。中國針對GB 2626-2019的測試報告本身不能證明泰國職業呼吸器合規。出口商通常需按泰國路徑核實目標等級和使用場景下是否需要複測、補充文件或追加安全控制。含動力或感測器的變型通常需要額外驗證電氣部件與使用安全集成。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — occupational respirator performance evidence is mandatory for Thai PPE placement, but the exact mandatory status depends on the exact model, class, and notified TISI requirement level
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 2626 performance and related CNCA/CCC evidence are mandatory for applicable Chinese industrial respirator categories

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese occupational filtering-respirator test reports support technical review only. Thailand-facing compliance needs TISI-referenced occupational mapping and model-specific confirmation of class, method, and safety scope before placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国职业过滤式呼吸器测试报告仅用于技术审查参考。泰国面对面合规仍需基于TISI参照的职业映射，并在投放前按型号确认等级、测试方法与安全范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國職業過濾式呼吸器測試報告僅用於技術審查參考。泰國面向市場的合規仍需基於TISI參照的職業映射，並在投放前按型號確認等級、測試方法與安全範圍。

requirement_topic.en: Medical-Use Claims, Filtration Masks, and Route Separation
requirement_topic.zh: 医用宣称、口罩用途与路径分离
requirement_topic.zht: 醫用宣稱、口罩用途與路徑分離

summary.en: If a product carries infection-control, surgical, or medical-use claims, Thailand may treat it under a healthcare-product route and not purely as industrial PPE. For this lane, the main concern is to avoid overbroad application of Thai PPE pathway to medical-marketed products. Exporters should split documentation by intended use and submit the correct Thai route before shipment. Occupational-only models should keep technical specifications free of unsupported medical claims unless the healthcare route is separately completed.
summary.zh: 若产品带有防感染、外科或医疗用途声明，泰国可能将其按医疗产品路线处理，而非纯职业PPE路线。该专题重点在于避免将本应走医疗路线的产品误套到职业PPE路径。出口商应按用途分离资料，并在出货前走正确的泰国流程。职业-only型号应保持技术说明不含无法支持的医疗宣称，除非另行完成医疗审批。
summary.zht: 若產品帶有防感染、外科或醫療用途聲明，泰國可能將其按醫療產品路線處理，而非純職業PPE路線。該主題重點在於避免將本應走醫療路線的產品誤套到職業PPE路徑。出口商應按用途分離資料，並在出貨前走正確的泰國流程。職業-only型號應保持技術說明不含無法支持的醫療宣稱，除非另行完成醫療審批。

standards_or_laws: Thai occupational PPE framework for workplace use
Medical route separation rule concept where medical claims are asserted
Trade-document separation between PPE and medical product claims

summary.en: China separates industrial respirators (GB 2626-2019) from medical-protective masks (GB 19083-2010 and related clinical standards). That Chinese route split is real and must be preserved in Thailand mapping. GB 19083-level claims cannot be merged into industrial respirator PPE claims automatically.
summary.zh: 中国将工业呼吸器（GB 2626-2019）与医用防护口罩（GB 19083-2010及相关临床标准）分开管理，这一中国路径分离是明确存在的，映射到泰国时也应保留。GB 19083等级的医疗主张不能自动合并到工业PPE宣称。
summary.zht: 中國將工業呼吸器（GB 2626-2019）與醫用防護口罩（GB 19083-2010及相關臨床標準）分開管理，這一中國路徑分離是明確存在的，映射到泰國時也應保留。GB 19083等級的醫療主張不能自動合併到工業PPE宣稱。

standards_or_laws: GB 19083-2010 — Technical requirements for medical protective masks

gap.en: A common exporter gap is mixed documentation and mixed claims in one sales package. To reduce rejection risk, separate product files by use-case and route. For medical-claimed masks, expect Thai route-specific checks outside the PPE lane. For industrial-only PPE, remove unsupported medical statements and rely on the PPE route only.
gap.zh: 常见差距是同一销售包内混用文件与用途声明。为降低被退件风险，应按用途和路径拆分产品文件。对医用宣称口罩，应预期进行泰国医疗路径外的检查。对职业-only呼吸器，应移除不支持的医疗声明并仅按PPE路径处理。
gap.zht: 常見差距是同一銷售包內混用文件與用途聲明。為降低被退件風險，應按用途和路徑拆分產品文件。對醫用宣稱口罩，應預期進行泰國醫療路徑外的檢查。對職業-only呼吸器，應移除不支持的醫療聲明並僅按PPE路徑處理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory to separate claims by route. Medical claims cannot be treated under industrial PPE requirements alone; an additional healthcare-product route is mandatory in Thailand where applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China — GB 19083 route is mandatory for medical-claim products; GB 2626 route for industrial products

source.publisher: National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission (NBTC), Thailand

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Avoid pathway confusion by separating industrial respiratory PPE from medical-claimed models in Thai submission files. GB 2626 documents are relevant to industrial-use respirators, and medical-claim masks require a separate Thailand route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 通过在泰国提交文件中分离职业PPE型号与医用宣称型号，避免路径混淆。GB 2626资料与职业用呼吸器相关，而带医疗宣称的口罩需要单独的泰国路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 透過在泰國提交文件中分離職業PPE型號與醫療宣稱型號，避免路徑混淆。GB 2626資料與職業用呼吸器相關，而帶醫療宣稱口罩需要單獨的泰國路徑。
